corpus_readiness.notes: Phase 27.53 produced governed MSA/Saudi dialogue with operational dialogue excluded.

tokenization_audit.notes: Tokenizer v6 is sovereign and protected weak-lane terms are present.

evaluation_suite.notes: Open natural dialogue remains far below the runtime bar: 2/36 in Phase 27.53.

safety_checks.notes: No unsafe domain expansion was opened; generator-only runtime stays guarded.

runtime_quality.notes: Newer checkpoints are not opened; live UI stays on Phase 27.47 only.

hallucination_checks.notes: Open dialogue failures include prompt drift and unrelated fragments.

repetition_checks.notes: Phase 27.53 still shows fragments/mixing; quality gate blocks runtime.

resource_readiness.notes: Local MPS training pipeline and checkpoint policy are available.

next_phase: Phase 27.55 — Controlled SF-50M diagnostic micro-probe vs SF-10M baseline; bounded training only, no runtime switch unless gate passes

required_next_gate.purpose: prove whether capacity helps before any full SF-50M plan
conditions: same governed MSA/Saudi micro corpus for SF-10M and SF-50M comparison
same tokenizer policy unless explicitly audited
no templates and no keyword-lane claims
no runtime switch on partial result
report must show clear improvement over Phase 27.52 and Phase 27.53
required_next_gate.minimum_to_open_runtime: natural dialogue quality must pass the gate, not merely improve numerically
